metadata.purpose: Source URLs the monthly pricing-drift check fetches to detect when 2026 industry pricing has moved beyond our spot-check bands. See scripts/_pricing-drift-check.js.
metadata.notes: Each vertical lists 3-5 representative industry pricing pages. Claude haiku-4-5 reads each, extracts the typical-installed-cost range it cites, and the script compares against the per-vertical calculator-spot-check baseline. Add or replace URLs when sources go stale or paywall.

pinpoints.label: 3-ton 16 SEER central AC, fully installed (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a 3-ton (~36,000 BTU) 16 SEER R-454B central air conditioner including labor, permits, and standard accessories. Average across single-family homes nationwide. Return only a JSON object: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<short quote from the source>"}.

pinpoints.label: 3-ton 16 SEER heat pump, fully installed (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a 3-ton 16 SEER R-454B heat pump including labor, permits, and standard accessories. Single-family home national average. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Full HVAC system AC + furnace 16 SEER / 90 AFUE 4-ton (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete HVAC system replacement (16 SEER central AC + 90 AFUE gas furnace) for an average 2,500 sqft home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Asphalt 3-tab shingle roof, 2,000 sqft home (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete 3-tab asphalt shingle roof replacement on a 2,000 sqft single-family home, including tear-off of one layer, underlayment, and standard accessories. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Architectural shingle roof, 2,000 sqft home (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete architectural (dimensional) asphalt shingle roof replacement on a 2,000 sqft home, including tear-off and standard installation. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Metal roof installation, 2,000 sqft home (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete metal roof replacement (mix of corrugated and standing seam) on a 2,000 sqft home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Vinyl siding, 1,500 sqft wall area, 1-story (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for vinyl siding installation on a 1,500 sqft wall area, 1-story home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Fiber cement (Hardie) siding, 2,000 sqft wall, 2-story
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for James Hardie or fiber cement siding installation on 2,000 sqft of wall area on a 2-story home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: 8 kW mid-tier solar, string inverter, no battery (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE (gross, before federal ITC) for an 8 kW residential solar system with mid-tier panels (Q Cells / LONGi / REC), string inverter, no battery storage. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: 11 kW premium solar with Tesla Powerwall (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE (gross, before federal ITC) for an 11 kW residential solar system with premium panels (SunPower / LG / Panasonic), microinverters, and one Tesla Powerwall battery. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Blown-in attic insulation, 1,500 sqft (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for blown-in attic insulation on a 1,500 sqft attic with R-30 to R-49 target. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Closed-cell spray foam in walls, 1,000 sqft (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for closed-cell spray foam insulation in 1,000 sqft of wall area. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Foundation pier installation, moderate scope (6 piers), modern home
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a foundation pier (push pier or helical) installation with about 6 piers on a modern (1990+) single-family home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Foundation wall stabilization, major scope, mid-century home
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for major foundation wall stabilization (carbon fiber straps + lateral braces) on a 1960-1989 single-family home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Foundation crack repair, minor (2 cracks), modern home
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for repairing 1-3 minor foundation cracks (epoxy/polyurethane injection) on a modern home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Panel upgrade 100A to 200A, modern home (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for upgrading an electrical panel from 100-amp to 200-amp service in a modern (post-2000) single-family home. Include permits and inspection. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Whole-house rewire, 2,000 sqft, pre-1970 (knob-and-tube)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a complete whole-house rewire on a 2,000 sqft pre-1970 home with knob-and-tube or aluminum wiring. Includes permits and patch/paint. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Level 2 EV charger installation (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for installing a Level 2 EV charger at a residential garage, including the unit and the dedicated 240V circuit. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Mid-range remodel, average size, quartz, semi-custom, mid appliances (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a mid-range kitchen remodel: average size 100-150 sqft, quartz countertops, semi-custom cabinets, mid-range appliances (KitchenAid/Bosch tier). National average. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Major upscale, large kitchen, custom cabinets, premium appliances (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a major upscale kitchen remodel with large size 150-200 sqft, custom cabinets, and premium appliances (Sub-Zero/Wolf tier). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Cabinet refacing, average size, semi-custom (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a cabinet refacing project on an average-size kitchen with semi-custom finish (no full cabinet replacement). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Brake pads + rotors per axle, standard sedan, independent shop (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical RepairPal/AAA cost RANGE for replacing front brake pads AND rotors per axle on a standard sedan (Camry/Accord-class) at an independent shop. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Engine replacement, standard sedan, independent shop (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a remanufactured engine replacement on a standard sedan at an independent shop, including labor and the reman engine itself. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: AGM battery replacement, standard sedan, chain shop (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for an AGM battery replacement on a standard modern sedan at a chain shop (Pep Boys / Firestone / Midas). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.
